name: Mushroom Cheeseburger Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 can Green Giant Sliced Mushrooms, drained (4.5 oz)
1 can Pillsbury Refrigerated All-Ready Pizza Crust (10 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oven to 425°F.
2. Grease a 12-inch pizza pan or 13x9 inch pan.
3. Unroll the dough and place it in the greased pan, starting at the center and pressing out with hands.
4. Bake at 425°F for 5-8 minutes, or until golden brown.
5. Brown ground beef in a medium skillet; drain.
6. Stir in pizza sauce and mushrooms.
7. Spoon the hamburger mixture over the partially baked crust.
8. Sprinkle with cheese.
9. Bake at 425°F for 10-15 minutes, or until deep golden brown.
